constraints.name: distance_bound
constraints.description: A fixed positive integer d is chosen before movement begins, and every jump must cover a distance of at most d cells.

constraints.name: state_transition
constraints.description: The valid target range for a jump is strictly determined by the character at the current cell: 'L' permits jumps only to the left within distance d, 'R' permits jumps only to the right within distance d, and the starting cell 0 only permits right jumps.
constraints.formal: s_i = \text{'L'} \implies v \in [\max(0, i-d), i-1]; \quad s_i = \text{'R'} \implies v \in [i+1, \min(n+1, i+d)]; \quad i=0 \implies v \in [1, \min(n+1, d)]

objective.description: 最小化保证青蛙能够从起点到达终点所需的最大单次跳跃距离

invariants.name: monotonicity
invariants.description: 青蛙能否到达终点的可行性关于跳跃距离 d 具有单调非减性质,且最小可行 d 严格由字符串中连续 'L' 段的最大长度（即相邻 'R' 或边界间的最大间隔）决定。标准解法通过按 'R' 分割字符串并取最大片段长度加一,直接计算该单调下界,体现了答案由局部瓶颈单调约束的稳定性质。
